message:
feat(readwrite,conformance): add adversarial parser fixtures and fuzz harnesses

Add a suite of adversarial input fixtures and corresponding tests to
validate that the edgelist, JSON, GraphML, and GML parsers handle
malformed, empty, and edge-case inputs gracefully without panicking.
Introduce cargo-fuzz harnesses for continuous fuzzing of all four
parser formats.

- Add crates/fnx-conformance/fixtures/adversarial/ with 11 fixtures:
  empty inputs (all formats), unicode nodes, self-loops, negative
  weights, huge star graph, malformed XML, and malformed GML nesting
- fnx-readwrite: add 12 adversarial parser tests covering empty input,
  unicode, self-loops, negative weights, and malformed format recovery
  in both strict and hardened modes; add GML round-trip comment
- Add fuzz/ directory with cargo-fuzz harnesses for fuzz_edgelist,
  fuzz_json, fuzz_graphml, and fuzz_gml parsers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+[package]
+name = "fnx-fuzz"
+version = "0.0.0"
+publish = false
+edition = "2024"
+
+[package.metadata]
+cargo-fuzz = true
+
+[dependencies]
+libfuzzer-sys = "0.4"
+fnx-readwrite = { path = "../crates/fnx-readwrite" }
+fnx-classes = { path = "../crates/fnx-classes" }
+
+# Prevent this from being discovered by cargo workspace
+[workspace]
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_edgelist"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_edgelist.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_json"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_json.rs"
